---
title: "Memoirs of Lady Fanshawe, wife of ... Sir Richard Fanshawe, Bart. Written by Herself"
---

## Memoirs of Lady Fanshawe, wife of ... Sir Richard Fanshawe, Bart. Written by Herself

**Author:** Ann, Lady Fanshawe
**Date:** 1829
**Imprint:** London: Colburn

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
